metadata.name: Amplify 1 — Canopy Crawler reveals Beast from hand for +1/+1 counter
metadata.description: Tests Amplify 1 (CR 702.38a) on Canopy Crawler ({3}{G}, 2/2 Beast). p1 has Canopy Crawler in hand and one Beast creature card (Blastoderm) also in hand. p1 casts Canopy Crawler. As Canopy Crawler enters the battlefield, the engine auto-reveals the Beast card from hand (Amplify 1 — 1 matching Beast card = 1 counter). Canopy Crawler enters as a 3/3 (2/2 base + 1 +1/+1 counter from Amplify). The Beast card (Blastoderm) remains in hand — revealing does NOT discard it (CR 702.38a). Amplify is a static replacement effect: the counter is placed as part of the ETB transition, not as a separate triggered ability, so no trigger goes on the stack.
metadata.generation_notes: Canopy Crawler card definition (crates/engine/src/cards/defs/canopy_crawler.rs): mana_cost {3}{G} (generic:3, green:1), types Creature — Beast, power 2, toughness 2. Abilities: AbilityDefinition::Keyword(KeywordAbility::Amplify(1)). Blastoderm (crates/engine/src/cards/defs/blastoderm.rs): mana_cost {2}{G}{G}, types Creature — Beast, power 5, toughness 5. Blastoderm is used as the Beast card in hand because it is a registered Beast creature in the card registry. Amplify is implemented in resolution.rs as a static replacement applied during the ETB transition (not a trigger — CR 614.1c): the engine auto-reveals all eligible Beast cards in the controller's hand (deterministic bot play — maximises counters). With 1 Beast card in hand (Blastoderm) and Amplify 1, total_amplify_counters = 1 * 1 = 1. Canopy Crawler enters with 1 +1/+1 counter: effective P/T 3/3 (base 2/2 + 1). Blastoderm stays in hand — CR 702.38a: 'reveal any number of Beast cards from your hand... put that many +1/+1 counters on it' — revealing is not discarding. No stack object is created for the counter placement; the CounterAdded event fires before PermanentEnteredBattlefield completes. mana_paid uses colorless:3 for the {3} generic portion and green:1 for {G}. The hand has count 2 (Canopy Crawler + Blastoderm) before casting, count 1 (Blastoderm only) after casting. Canopy Crawler itself is also a Beast (creature_types &["Beast"]) but CR 702.38a specifies revealing cards 'from your hand' — the Canopy Crawler is the spell being cast (on the stack), not in hand, so it does not count toward the reveal.

script.step_note: p1 casts Canopy Crawler ({3}{G}). Both players pass priority. Canopy Crawler resolves and enters the battlefield. Amplify 1 auto-reveals Blastoderm (Beast) from hand — 1 counter placed. Blastoderm stays in hand.

actions.description: Initial: Canopy Crawler and Blastoderm in p1 hand; battlefield empty; stack empty
actions.note: p1 holds both Canopy Crawler (the spell to cast) and Blastoderm (the Beast to reveal for Amplify). Mana pool has {3}{G} ready.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Canopy Crawler ({3}{G}); colorless:3 + green:1 paid from pool. Canopy Crawler moves from hand to stack. Blastoderm remains in hand.

actions.description: After cast: Canopy Crawler on stack; Blastoderm still in hand (count 1)
actions.note: CR 601.2: Canopy Crawler is on the stack awaiting resolution. Blastoderm remains in p1's hand — it will be auto-revealed for Amplify during resolution but is NOT discarded.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack (Canopy Crawler) resolves (CR 608.2).

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Canopy Crawler (2/2 Beast, Amplify 1) resolves and enters the battlefield. CR 702.38a: As it enters, the engine auto-reveals all Beast cards in p1's hand. Blastoderm is a Beast — 1 matching card revealed. Amplify 1: 1 card * 1 counter/card = 1 +1/+1 counter placed on Canopy Crawler as it enters. Blastoderm is NOT discarded — CR 702.38a only requires revealing. Canopy Crawler enters with 1 +1/+1 counter: effective P/T 3/3 (base 2/2 + 1/+1).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Canopy Crawler resolves. CR 702.38a: Amplify 1 static replacement fires during ETB — 1 Beast revealed (Blastoderm), 1 +1/+1 counter placed. No separate trigger is created (Amplify is a static/replacement effect, not a triggered ability — CR 614.1c).

actions.description: Final: Canopy Crawler on battlefield with 1 +1/+1 counter (effective 3/3); Blastoderm still in hand; stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.38a: Canopy Crawler entered with 1 +1/+1 counter (Amplify 1 — 1 Beast revealed from hand). Effective P/T is 3/3 (base 2/2 + 1). Blastoderm remains in p1's hand — revealing for Amplify does not discard the card. Stack is empty.
